message:
fix: set DEV_MODE and JWT_SECRET in startup smoke test (#5885)

Without DEV_MODE=true or JWT_SECRET, the backend exits immediately
on startup, preventing the health check from ever succeeding.

Fixes #5884

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -47,7 +47,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Start backend and verify health
         run: |
           # Start the console backend on port 8081 (simulating watchdog mode)
-          BACKEND_PORT=8081 ./console-bin &
+          # DEV_MODE=true skips JWT_SECRET requirement; JWT_SECRET set as fallback (#5884)
+          DEV_MODE=true JWT_SECRET=ci-smoke-test BACKEND_PORT=8081 ./console-bin &
           BACKEND_PID=$!
 
           # Wait up to 30 seconds for the backend to respond
